creator: f.vdveer@chello.nl
text:
Created attachment 229569
Poudriere build log file for FreeCAD

During a Poudriere build cad/FreeCAD-0.19.2_3 fails to build due to a multiple file include error taken from OpenCascade. 

I do not know if this really should be an OpenCascade problem, but since that builds normally, I report the failure here.

It is build inside a poudriere jail, FreeBSD 12.2-Release-p7 amd64

The lastest part of the attached log shows the details.
